JUDGE DIANE WICK, BETH WILBER-CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS-REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PLAINTIFF APPEARS IN PRO PER, NO APPEARANCE BY PRO PER DEFENDANT. CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITHOUT DEFENDANT. COURT RULES IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF, PLTF. TO SUBMIT JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCOY, JAMES THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PRITA HOTEL, 2284 MISSON ST, ROOM #16, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF WAIVES COSTS AND DAMAGES.
